Home.metaDescription: Yapinci — a premium apparel brand inspired by Azerbaijani culture. Discover our collections.

Brand.description: A premium apparel brand inspired by Azerbaijani culture.

story.title: The Story Behind Every Symbol
paragraphs: Every motif in a Yapinci piece carries meaning — dragon scales for protection, pomegranate threads for abundance, geometric borders drawn from centuries of Caucasian craft.
We study archives, speak with artisans, and distill symbolism into garments that feel contemporary, not costume. Each symbol is chosen with intention, then rendered with restraint.

craftsmanship.title: Every Detail, Considered
paragraphs: From pattern to final stitch, our garments are developed in small batches with artisans who understand both heritage techniques and contemporary construction.
Natural linens, refined wools, and responsibly sourced cottons are selected for longevity. Subtle embroidery and texture reference Azerbaijani artistry without spectacle — luxury that speaks softly.

dragon.title: Dragon Collection
dragon.description: Ancient dragon motifs reimagined in modern silhouettes — strength, guardianship, and the spirit of the Caucasus.

baku.title: Baku Collection
baku.description: Urban elegance inspired by the Caspian coast — linen layers, soft structure, and the rhythm of the city.

heritageSymbols.title: Heritage Symbols
heritageSymbols.description: Timeless emblems woven into premium fabrics — each piece a quiet conversation between past and present.

symbolsOfCaucasus.title: Symbols of the Caucasus
symbolsOfCaucasus.excerpt: How ancient motifs find their place in contemporary wardrobes without losing their meaning.

insideAtelier.title: Inside the Atelier
insideAtelier.excerpt: A look at the artisans and techniques behind every Yapinci garment.

aDayInBaku.title: A Day in Baku
aDayInBaku.excerpt: Morning light on the Caspian, evening in the old city — dressing for both worlds.

About.metaDescription: About Yapinci — a premium apparel brand inspired by Azerbaijani culture.
About.title: About Yapinci
About.paragraph1: Yapinci is a premium apparel brand that honors Azerbaijan's rich cultural heritage while meeting the demands of the modern world. Every collection reflects a harmony of traditional motifs, natural fabrics, and minimalist aesthetics.
About.paragraph2: We believe clothing is more than functional — it is an expression of identity and culture. Every piece is made with carefully selected fabrics, handcrafted details, and sustainable production principles.
About.paragraph3: The Yapinci Commerce platform is the digital face of our brand — discover our collections, place your order, and enjoy a premium shopping experience.
About.addressFull: Baku, Surakhani district, Yeni Surakhani settlement, 14 Iyul street 6
About.addressShort: Baku, Surakhani dist., Yeni Surakhani sett., 14 Iyul str. 6

values.title: Quality
values.description: Every piece is crafted to the highest standard, using natural fabrics and handcrafted details.

values.title: Culture
values.description: Azerbaijan's rich cultural heritage is reinterpreted through a modern design language.

values.title: Sustainability
values.description: We create garments built to last — timeless pieces beyond fleeting trends.

Privacy.metaDescription: Yapinci's policy on the protection of user data.
Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: At Yapinci, we place great importance on protecting our customers' personal information. This document explains what information is collected and how it is used.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body: The following information is collected during the ordering process:

sections.title: 2. Card Information
sections.body: Bank card details (card number, expiry date, CVV code) are never stored on our servers. Payments are processed directly through the secure system of a licensed payment provider, and Yapinci does not access or store this information.

sections.title: 3. Use of Information
sections.body: The information collected is used solely for the following purposes:

sections.title: 4. Sharing Information with Third Parties
sections.body: Customer information is not shared with or sold to third parties, except for the courier service that carries out delivery.

sections.title: 5. Data Protection
sections.body: All personal information collected is protected by appropriate technical measures and retained only for as long as necessary.

sections.title: 6. User Rights
sections.body: Any customer may request the deletion or correction of their personal information by contacting info@yapinci.az.

Terms.metaDescription: Terms and rules for using the Yapinci website.
Terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
Terms.intro: These terms apply to all customers using the website operated by "Yapinci" (Sole Proprietor, VÖEN: 6701935972). By using the website, you are deemed to have accepted the following terms.

sections.title: 1. Product Purchase
sections.body: All products (clothing and accessories) offered on our website can be purchased through the online order form. To place an order, the customer adds the product to the cart, enters delivery details, and completes payment. Once the order is confirmed, a confirmation notice is sent to the customer by email.

sections.title: 2. Delivery Terms
list: Delivery is carried out via courier service.
Delivery time is 1-3 business days from order confirmation.
Delivery within Baku city costs 3 AZN.
Delivery is free for orders of 100 AZN or more.
Delivery time may vary depending on region or special circumstances.

sections.title: 3. Payment
sections.body: Payments are made on the website via bank card or other available payment methods. All payments are processed through a secure payment system.

sections.title: 4. Pricing
sections.body: All prices shown on the website are in Azerbaijani manat (AZN) and include applicable taxes. Prices may be changed without prior notice.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: Yapinci is not liable for losses arising from technical failures, interruptions in third-party services, or the user's own errors.

Return.metaDescription: Terms for returning Yapinci products and cancelling orders.
Return.title: Return and Cancellation Policy

sections.title: 1. Return Conditions
list: Products may be returned within 14 days of the delivery date.
Returned products must be unused, in their original tags and packaging, and in the condition they were sold.
To initiate a return, customers must contact us at info@yapinci.az or +994 50 869 47 74.

sections.title: 2. Return Process
sections.body: Once a return request is approved, the product is sent back by the customer or collected by courier. After inspection, the refund is issued within 5-7 business days.

sections.title: 3. Order Cancellation
sections.body: An order may be cancelled by the customer before it is handed over to the courier (i.e., before the delivery process begins). Once an order has been handed over to the courier, it can no longer be cancelled and the product can only be returned under the return policy.

sections.title: 4. Exceptions
sections.body: Custom-made products (discounted or special orders) and products used for hygiene reasons are not eligible for return.
